sections.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Would + Ought To + Dare — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Would + Ought To + Dare is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Would (polite/habit) + Ought to (moral duty) + Dare (courage to do something). Rules: 'Would' is used for polite requests, past habits, and hypothetical situations | 'Ought to' expresses moral duty or what is correct, similar to 'should' but stronger in written English | 'Dare' expresses having the courage to do something risky | Negative: would not, ought not to, dare not
sections.formula: Would (polite/habit) + Ought to (moral duty) + Dare (courage to do something)

examples.hindi: मैं पहले हर रोज़ वहाँ जाता था।
examples.english: I would go there every day before.

examples.hindi: हमें अपने माता-पिता की इज्जत करनी चाहिए।
examples.english: We ought to respect our parents.
You ought to tell the truth.

examples.hindi: उसकी हिम्मत नहीं है ऐसा कहने की।
examples.english: He does not dare to say this.

sections.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Would + Ought To + Dare — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Would + Ought To + Dare for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Would (polite/habit) + Ought to (moral duty) + Dare (courage to do something)

examples.hindi: मैं यह पहले नहीं करता था।
examples.english: I would not do this before.

examples.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
examples.english: We ought to follow the rules.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम्हें उससे बात करने की हिम्मत है?
examples.english: Do you dare to talk to him?

examples.hindi: उसने ऐसा कहने की हिम्मत की।

sections.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Would + Ought To + Dare — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Would + Ought To + Dare in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Would (polite/habit) + Ought to (moral duty) + Dare (courage to do something)

examples.english: We ought to fulfill our responsibility.

examples.hindi: उसकी हिम्मत नहीं थी कि वह ऐसा कर सके।
examples.english: He did not dare to do this.

sections.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Would + Ought To + Dare — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Would + Ought To + Dare. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Would (polite/habit) + Ought to (moral duty) + Dare (courage to do something)

examples.hindi: कैसे तुमने ऐसा कहने की हिम्मत की?
